task_objective: Fix n_var metadata inflation in ProfileReport
design_decisions: Changed ProfileReport._build to use len(self.variables) instead of len(self.schema) for n_var computation.
Ensured that the synthetic _dataset entry does not count as a variable in the summary table.
Verified that p_cells_missing is correctly calculated using the updated n_var.
results: n_var now accurately reflects the number of real columns, and derived metrics are no longer skewed by metadata. Full test suite passes with 91% coverage.
